raw_consumer_statement: At the month of XX/XX/year> my card was used for purchase online at live streaming call XXXX without my knowledge after fraud team from my credit card company American Express was calling me asking if I made this purchase and I reported as fraud and they fixed the problem and next day I received all amount of money and I leave it like that letter on after that I found out they get back the same amount of fraud money and asking me to pay it again to whom care the amount money of XXXXXXXX XXXX and some exchange without received any explanation so I call them back they asked me to contact the XXXX which I already did and asked them to provide me info about using my card and they dont then I call my credit company and I requesting re open the case they already did but they asked me for police report or official report to help me to fix the problem
